scores.correctness_notes: Core answer is fully correct: temp_model(), deploy(), wait(jubilant.all_active) all match the gold standard. Additional patterns shown (local charm, multiple apps, custom conditions) are consistent with the API.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several items may not exist: `delay=` parameter on wait(), `Juju(wait_timeout=)` constructor param, `status.apps[].is_active`/`is_blocked` as direct bool properties, `jubilant.all_blocked`/`all_maintenance`/`all_waiting`/`any_active`/`any_blocked` helpers. These go beyond what's confirmed in the gold standard and may be fabricated.
